description: Background images for the Phase 2 compositor. Empty surfaces — no subject, just texture/color/lighting. Used as paste targets for rendered instances.
style_prefix: photograph, empty surface, no objects, no products, no people, no text, no branding, evenly lit, neutral angle
negative: people, face, hands, object, product, fruit, bottle, box, text, watermark, logo, sign, busy scene, clutter, frame, border, signature
generation_notes: Each background should be subject-free and neutral. Fed into BackgroundPool and rotated across composites to prevent the model from learning 'more texture = more objects.'

subjects.prompt: top-down photograph of a plain empty wooden table surface, clean oak grain, natural daylight, no objects, no marks, no text
top-down photograph of a plain empty grey concrete floor, fine texture, even overhead lighting, no objects, no markings, no debris
top-down photograph of a plain empty white cotton tablecloth, soft fabric weave, natural daylight, gentle folds at the edges, no stains, no objects
top-down photograph of a plain empty grey marble kitchen counter, subtle veins, clean surface, even lighting, no objects, no utensils
